verses.text: Kuamah in Pasian' min leh i thuhilhnate hong gensiatsak lohna dingin sila khempeuh in a tote uh zahtakbawl ta uh hen

Thu um mi to-in a nei silate in upna sungah sanggam khat hi hang, ci-in ngaihsutna tawh a tote uh zahtakbawl loin omkha kei uh hen. Amaute' nasepna hangin hamphatna a ngah mite pen thu um mi leh a it uh mite ahih manin a hoihzaw-in a sepsak ding uh a kilawmzaw ahi hi.
Topa Jesuh Khrih thu tawh a kituaklo, i biakna paizia tawh a kilehngatin thu tuamdang a hilh mite pen

a kiphasak mawkmawk hi uh a, bangmah a thei hetlo ahi uh hi. Tua bang mite in thu kisel thu kinial cihte ut belin nei uh a, hazatna, lungsim kituahlohna, kizahkona, a sialamin ki-upmawhnate piangsak uh a
thuman thutak zuiloin, a lungsim paizia uh a man nawnlo, biakna pen hauhtheihna ding lampi bekin a ngaihsun mite in a tawntungin kitot kiselna a piangsak uh ahi hi
Pasian biakna hangin a neihsateng tawh a lungkim mite pen biakna in mihau a suaksak takpi mah ahi hi
A taktakin ci lehang, leitungah mihingin i suah laitakin sumlepai tawh i suak kei a, i sih ciangin zong leitung panin bangmah i keng thei tuan kei hi
Tua ahih manin annek tuidawn, nikten' puansilh i neih nak leh a phazo ahi hi
Ahi zongin a haunuam mite in ze-etna a tuamtuam thuak a, duhhopna huaihamna a haivai thute-ah awkcipin, haksatna leh siatna a tuahlawh uh hi
Sum deihluatna in siatna namkim piangsak hi. Mi pawlkhat in sum deihlua liang uh ahih manin a upna panun pialkhia-in gimna lungkhamna tampi a thuaklawh uh hi.
Ahi zongin Pasian' mi ahi nangmah in tua thute khempeuh pelh in la, thuman thutak, Pasian' deih bangin nuntakna, upna, itna, kipna, leh lungnemna na neihzawhna dingin hanciam in
Upna thu-ah hoihtakin nawksuak in la, mi tampi' zakin na pulaksa, Pasian in nangmah a hong piak nuntak tawntungna lenkip in
Na khempeuh tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian, leh Pontias Pilat mai-ah hangtakin thu a gen ngam Khrih Jesuh' mai-ah nang ka hong thupiakna in
I Topa Jesuh hong kilatkik Ni dongin paubaan'na leh mawhsakna om hetloin nang hong kipia thute na zui in
Kumpite' Kumpi, topate' Topa, thupha ngahin amah bek a lianpen ahi Pasian in hun a sak khatpeuh ciangin Jesuh hong kilangsak kik ding hi

Tua i Pasian bek mah a si theilo hi a, khuavak pha mahmah sungah om ahih manin kuamah in a kiang neh theilo hi. Kuamah in amah mu ngeilo a, zong mu theilo hi. A tawntungin amah kipahtawi hen la, vanglian tawntung ta hen. Amen
Tuhuna a hau mite kisatheikha loin, a kiplo hauhnate muan' leh suan'in neikha loin, eite in nuamtakin i zat theihdingin citna tawh a hong pia Pasian a muan' a suan'na dingun na hilh in
A hoih nate semin, gamtat pha-in, citna lungsim nei-in midangte a hopnopna dingun na hilh in
Tua hi leh mailamah amaute' nuntakna ding bulpi taktak ahi neihsate, amau-a' dingin a khol mite ahi ding uh hi
Timoti aw, nang tungah a hong kipia thute hoihtakin na zui in. Mi pawlkhatte in, “Thu theihna,” ci-in a ngaihsutkhak uh, Pasian' thu tawh a kituaklo, thu kihai selnate na pelh in
Mi pawlkhatte in tua bang pilna a nei-in kingaihsun uh a, upna thu bulpi khahsuahna-in a nei uh hi. Note khempeuh tungah Pasian' dikna thupha hong tung ta hen.
